campaign_goal: Validate the pg_enigma campaign harness on the fixed `frontier_rebase/pr1394/train_gpt_human.py` base by enforcing downstream-only control-paired comparison first, then testing same-trace checkpoint/export selection, while carrying recurrence handoff and shared-trunk late branching as deferred next mechanisms once the harness exposes the needed primitives.
name: State-Triggered Recurrence Handoff Program
why_keep: It attacks a concrete invariant in `train_gpt_human.py`: recurrence timing is fixed by `ENABLE_LOOPING_AT` instead of a searched handoff program.
minimal_probe: After adding runtime state-conditioned control hooks, run a mid-training pack with 2 controls, one coarse late handoff realization, and one signal-triggered handoff realization, with final judgment on downstream `score_bpb`.
expected_signal: A handoff realization shows a cleaner post-transition trajectory and then a downstream `score_bpb` gain beyond control spread at matched wall-clock budget.
pack_rationale: Keep deferred until the primitive exists; when unblocked, it must earn solo support in its own mid-training pack before any composition.

source_candidate.worldview: Keep the published pr1394 SP8192/GPTQ-embeddings/depth-recurrence/MuonEq-R/SDClip stack frozen and treat this cycle as a harness-validity search over bounded comparison, selector, and transition programs. Favor families that change the unit of comparison or artifact/transition policy on the real base, and mark stateful controller or branching lines as blocked when the current target script and harness do not yet expose the needed primitives.
source_candidate.name: State-Triggered Recurrence Handoff Program
source_candidate.mechanism: Replace the single fixed recurrence schedule with a bounded handoff program: keep the non-looped trunk until cheap training signals indicate stabilization, then enable depth recurrence together with its finisher regime so recurrent compute is allocated only when the base representation is ready.
source_candidate.broken_invariant: The best way to use recurrence on pr1394 is a fixed wall-clock fraction such as `ENABLE_LOOPING_AT`, rather than a state-triggered transition program.
source_candidate.not_local_tuning_reason: This family changes when recurrent compute exists and why the optimizer crosses regimes; it rewrites the training program around a handoff, rather than nudging one schedule scalar.
source_candidate.measurement_plan: A real handoff program should show a cleaner post-transition pre-quant slope and then a better downstream sliding-window score at similar wall-clock budget.
source_candidate.smallest_decisive_probe: Compare three programs: fixed published recurrence control, late handoff by coarse phase rule, and signal-triggered handoff using cheap observables such as loss slope or update norm. Judge first by post-handoff pre-quant trajectory and finally by downstream `score_bpb`.
source_candidate.expected_observable: A real handoff program should show a cleaner post-transition pre-quant slope and then a better downstream sliding-window score at similar wall-clock budget.
source_candidate.falsifier: If signal-triggered handoff is indistinguishable from the fixed control within control spread, or it destabilizes immediately after transition, the mechanism is false.
source_candidate.novelty_vs_history: This line is different from a bare `ENABLE_LOOPING_AT` sweep because the object of search is the handoff policy itself, matching the repo's recurring controller/handoff abstraction rather than another static threshold pack.
source_candidate.self_check_summary: Strong consequence and novelty because it turns static recurrence timing into a transition program. It remains honest by marking the idea blocked until the target script or harness exposes runtime state-conditioned control hooks.

reasons: This is the strongest transition-program family because it attacks a concrete invariant in the target script: fixed recurrence activation timing.
It moves recurrence from scalar tuning to a true handoff policy.
The family is honest about needing new runtime state-conditioned control hooks, which makes it a valid deferred keep rather than fake executability.
